info.name: Stripe Connect API
info.description:
Stripe Connect is a set of programmable APIs and tools that lets you facilitate payments on your software platform, build a marketplace, and pay out sellers or service providers globally.

Contact Support:
 Name: Stripe Dev Platform Team
 Email: dev-platform@stripe.com

urlencoded.description: (Required) The reason for rejecting the account.

request.description: Rejects a connected account and disables the ability to make charges or receive payouts.
